{"type": "tool", "phase": "INTAKE", "reason": "Confirm whether string literals are allowed in UNION SELECT. {"type": "tool", "phase": "INTAKE", "reason": "The previous database() call returned HTTP 500 while UNION SELECT 1,2,3 worked.
